tool.name: nf-core/PIPELINE_NAME
tool.command:
## ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ ## Running pipeline ## ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
nextflow drop -f nf-core/PIPELINE_NAME && nextflow run nf-core/PIPELINE_NAME -r dev -latest -profile apptainer -ansi-log false --outdir ./results PARAMETERS
&& zip -r results.zip results

citations.citation: @misc{nf-core/PIPELINE_NAME, author = {}, year = {}, title = {nf-core/PIPELINE_NAME}, publisher = {GitHub}, journal = {GitHub repository}, url = {https://github.com/nf-core/PIPELINE_NAME}, }
